displayTitle: Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows #1
synopsis: During the Clone Wars, a single trooper—left for dead during battle—comes to hate the Jedi generals who abandoned him. Years later, he lives on, bitter and angry, until hearing tales of a great warrior. Now, this clone believes he may have found the leader he should have been following all along . . . Darth Vader! * All-new series starring Darth Vader! * Tim Siedell (@badbanana) has one of Time’s 140 Best Twitter Feeds! “A fine example of what Vader can and should be all about.”—Comic Book Resources
title: Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows #1
